languages.text: "Льды наступали на мавзолей, непрестанно сокрушая его оболочку, и реанимационные протоколы воззвали ко мне, пробуждая. Стихия противоборствовала с мыслью и одержала верх, сокрушив и мавзолей, и верного, пытавшегося ее укротить. Века минули с тех пор, и расхитители обнаружили меня, утонувшего в их водах".

"The ice was encroaching on the mausoleum, crushing its shell without relenting, and the reanimation protocols invoked me, awakening me. Nature and idea clashed, and nature prevailed, crushing both the mausoleum and the faithful one who had tried to tame it. Centuries have passed since then, and the plunderers found me drowned in their waters."
languages.original_text: "Льды наступали на мавзолей, непрестанно сокрушая его оболочку, и реанимационные протоколы воззвали ко мне, пробуждая. Стихия противоборствовала с мыслью и одержала верх, сокрушив и мавзолей, и верного, пытавшегося ее укротить. Века минули с тех пор, и расхитители обнаружили меня, утонувшего в их водах".

Nature and idea clashed, and nature prevailed, crushing both the mausoleum and the faithful one who had tried to tame it. Centuries have passed since then, and the plunderers found me drowned in their waters."

languages.text: “寒冰侵蚀着陵墓，毫不留情地碾碎其外壳，重塑协议因此被触发，将我唤醒。自然与意志交锋，自然胜出，摧毁了陵墓，碾碎了试图驯服它的忠仆。数个世纪过去，劫掠者在他们的水域中发现了沉没于此的我。”
languages.original_text: "The ice was encroaching on the mausoleum, crushing its shell without relenting, and the reanimation protocols invoked me, awakening me. Nature and idea clashed, and nature prevailed, crushing both the mausoleum and the faithful one who had tried to tame it. Centuries have passed since then, and the plunderers found me drowned in their waters."

traits.locale_text: “寒冰侵蚀着陵墓，毫不留情地碾碎其外壳，重塑协议因此被触发，将我唤醒。自然与意志交锋，自然胜出，摧毁了陵墓，碾碎了试图驯服它的忠仆。数个世纪过去，劫掠者在他们的水域中发现了沉没于此的我。”

languages.text: «El hielo invadía el mausoleo, presionando su coraza sin descanso, y los protocolos de reanimación me convocaron, lo que terminó despertándome. La naturaleza ganó la guerra contra los ideales y acabó con el mausoleo. El creyente que trató de dominarla se encontró con el mismo destino. Siglos más tarde, los saqueadores me encontraron en las profundidades de sus aguas».
languages.original_text: "The ice was encroaching on the mausoleum, crushing its shell without relenting, and the reanimation protocols invoked me, awakening me. Nature and idea clashed, and nature prevailed, crushing both the mausoleum and the faithful one who had tried to tame it. Centuries have passed since then, and the plunderers found me drowned in their waters."

traits.locale_text: «El hielo invadía el mausoleo, presionando su coraza sin descanso, y los protocolos de reanimación me convocaron, lo que terminó despertándome. La naturaleza ganó la guerra contra los ideales y acabó con el mausoleo. El creyente que trató de dominarla se encontró con el mismo destino. Siglos más tarde, los saqueadores me encontraron en las profundidades de sus aguas».

languages.text: « La glace se répandait dans le mausolée, écrasant ses murs sans le moindre répit, et les protocoles de réanimation m'ont invoqué et réveillé. La nature et l'idée se sont opposées, et la nature a fini par l'emporter, étouffant à la fois le mausolée et le fidèle qui avait tenté de la contrôler. Des siècles se sont ensuite écoulés, jusqu'à ce que des pillards me retrouvent noyé dans leurs eaux. »
languages.original_text: "The ice was encroaching on the mausoleum, crushing its shell without relenting, and the reanimation protocols invoked me, awakening me. Nature and idea clashed, and nature prevailed, crushing both the mausoleum and the faithful one who had tried to tame it. Centuries have passed since then, and the plunderers found me drowned in their waters."

traits.locale_text: « La glace se répandait dans le mausolée, écrasant ses murs sans le moindre répit, et les protocoles de réanimation m'ont invoqué et réveillé. La nature et l'idée se sont opposées, et la nature a fini par l'emporter, étouffant à la fois le mausolée et le fidèle qui avait tenté de la contrôler. Des siècles se sont ensuite écoulés, jusqu'à ce que des pillards me retrouvent noyé dans leurs eaux. »

languages.text: "Buz; anıt mezarı istila ediyor, kabuğunu acımasızca eziyordu. Canlandırma protokolleri beni çağırdı, uyandırdı. Doğa ile düşünce çatıştı, doğa galip gelerek hem anıt mezarı hem de onu evcilleştirmeye çalışan sadığı ezdi. O zamandan bu yana yüzyıllar geçti ve yağmacılar beni suda boğulmuş hâlde buldu."
languages.original_text: "The ice was encroaching on the mausoleum, crushing its shell without relenting, and the reanimation protocols invoked me, awakening me. Nature and idea clashed, and nature prevailed, crushing both the mausoleum and the faithful one who had tried to tame it. Centuries have passed since then, and the plunderers found me drowned in their waters."

traits.locale_text: "Buz; anıt mezarı istila ediyor, kabuğunu acımasızca eziyordu. Canlandırma protokolleri beni çağırdı, uyandırdı. Doğa ile düşünce çatıştı, doğa galip gelerek hem anıt mezarı hem de onu evcilleştirmeye çalışan sadığı ezdi. O zamandan bu yana yüzyıllar geçti ve yağmacılar beni suda boğulmuş hâlde buldu."

languages.text: "Das Eis hüllte das Mausoleum ein, zermalmte unerbittlich seine Hülle und die Reanimationsprotokolle erweckten mich. Natur und Verstand kollidierten, Natur siegte und zerstörte das Mausoleum und den Glaubenden, der versucht hatte, sie zu bändigen. Seitdem sind Jahrhunderte vergangen, und die Plünderer fanden mich ertrunken in ihren Wassern."
languages.original_text: "The ice was encroaching on the mausoleum, crushing its shell without relenting, and the reanimation protocols invoked me, awakening me. Nature and idea clashed, and nature prevailed, crushing both the mausoleum and the faithful one who had tried to tame it. Centuries have passed since then, and the plunderers found me drowned in their waters."

traits.locale_text: "Das Eis hüllte das Mausoleum ein, zermalmte unerbittlich seine Hülle und die Reanimationsprotokolle erweckten mich. Natur und Verstand kollidierten, Natur siegte und zerstörte das Mausoleum und den Glaubenden, der versucht hatte, sie zu bändigen. Seitdem sind Jahrhunderte vergangen, und die Plünderer fanden mich ertrunken in ihren Wassern."

languages.text: 「氷は陵墓に迫り、その殻を押しつぶし、そして蘇生のための儀式が私を呼び覚ました。自然とアイデアが衝突し、自然が勝った。陵墓とそれを抑えようとした忠実な者も、共に押しつぶされた。それから何世紀も経ち、略奪者たちは私を水に沈めた」
languages.original_text: "The ice was encroaching on the mausoleum, crushing its shell without relenting, and the reanimation protocols invoked me, awakening me. Nature and idea clashed, and nature prevailed, crushing both the mausoleum and the faithful one who had tried to tame it. Centuries have passed since then, and the plunderers found me drowned in their waters."

traits.locale_text: 「氷は陵墓に迫り、その殻を押しつぶし、そして蘇生のための儀式が私を呼び覚ました。自然とアイデアが衝突し、自然が勝った。陵墓とそれを抑えようとした忠実な者も、共に押しつぶされた。それから何世紀も経ち、略奪者たちは私を水に沈めた。」
